description_long: This is a rugged, brown leather handbag with a utilitarian design, featuring visible stitching and patchwork repairs that give it a well-worn, practical appearance. The front is adorned with a large metallic wrench strapped across the surface, suggesting a mechanic or engineer's tool bag. The bag has a long, adjustable shoulder strap and two prominent horizontal straps securing the main compartment. Side pockets with flap closures are present on both ends, adding to its storage capacity. The leather surface is matte with some areas showing reinforced stitching and patch patches, indicating durability and frequent use. The overall look is functional, with minimal decorative elements aside from the prominent wrench and visible repairs.
description: A rugged brown leather handbag with visible stitching, patchwork, and a large metallic wrench strapped to the front, designed for practical use and durability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main compartment, two horizontal securing straps, a large metallic wrench, and visible patchwork stitching.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side pocket with a flap closure and the shoulder strap attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back with reinforced stitching and the continuation of the horizontal straps.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals another side pocket with flap closure and the shoulder strap draped over the side.
attribute_strap_type: Single long adjustable shoulder strap, attached at both ends, suitable for crossbody or shoulder carry.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Main compartment secured by two horizontal leather straps with buckles; side pockets have flap closures.
attribute_decorative_elements: Large metallic wrench strapped to the front, visible patchwork stitching, and reinforced leather patches.
